SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.motorhead.JobRequest

Packages that use JobRequest
Package
Description
com.nib.motorhead
Core implementation and configuration for the Supernaut distributed job execution engine.
com.nib.motorhead.mongodb
MongoDB implementation for Supernaut 's long-term storage.
com.nib.motorhead.rdbms
Relational Database (RDBMS) implementation for Supernaut 's long-term storage.
com.nib.motorhead.redis
Redis-based implementation for Supernaut 's cluster backbone.
com.nib.motorhead.rest
REST API controllers and data transfer objects (DTOs) for the Supernaut service.
com.nib.motorhead.scripting
Scripting engine and integration interface for job scripts.
